---
title: "Isabella Segarra"
toc: false 
image: photo-of-me.png
about:
  template: solana
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/isabella-segarra-5ba5002b5/
      target: _blank
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/IsabellaSegarra
      target: _blank
      icon: github
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:isegarra@ucsb.edu
      icon: envelope 
---

## Hi there!

I'm Isabella Segarra , an environmental data scientist and MEDS student at UC Santa Barbara's Bren School. My path started at UC Merced in the Central Valley, where environmental science led me into the field: fungal ecology, phenology, and my own grassland invasive species research. When my curiosity outpaced any single discipline, I turned to data as the throughline, a way to study the ecosystems I love. Outside of research, I'm logging miles toward my next marathon (2 full, 2 half), digging through used bookstores, and hunting for thrift finds.
